# Start2Growth

> One ecosystem. Three specialized companies. Unlimited growth.

Start2Growth is a collaborative business ecosystem based in Chennai, India, combining three specialized companies: JM Creations (branding & media), Zigo Digital (performance marketing), and Tech Buddy Space Pvt Ltd (technology & automation).

## Business Summary

Start2Growth provides end-to-end business growth solutions from startup registration and branding to website development, AI automation, cloud infrastructure, digital marketing, and scaling strategies — all under one roof.

## Structure

- Homepage: /
- JM Creations (branding, social media, content, video): /jm-creations
- Zigo Digital (Meta Ads, Google Ads, SEO, lead generation): /zigo-digital
- Tech Buddy Space (web, mobile, AI/ML, cloud, DevOps): /techbuddyspace
- Client Case Studies: /clients
- Individual Client Stories: /clients/[slug]

## Services

### JM Creations
Business registration, social media management, content creation, branding, digital marketing, Facebook/Instagram/Google ads, lead generation, video production, drone shoots, business strategy.

### Zigo Digital
Meta Ads, Google Ads, lead generation, Google Business optimization, SEO, funnel building, conversion optimization, WhatsApp marketing, email marketing, analytics, marketing automation.

### Tech Buddy Space Pvt Ltd
Corporate websites, e-commerce stores, PWAs, Android/iOS apps, Flutter apps, AI chatbots, ML solutions, cloud migration (AWS/Azure/GCP), CI/CD, CRM, ERP, HRMS, cybersecurity audits.

## Contact

- Phone: +91 90429 86355
- Email: hello@start2growth.in
- Address: No. 1/2, 1st Floor, Pillaiyar Koil Street, Old Pallavaram, Chennai - 600 117
- Website: https://www.start2growth.in

## Target Audience

Startups, SMEs, local businesses, student founders, service providers, and growing companies looking to expand their digital identity and customer reach across India.
